test_cases.description: Verifies the skill applies the Seven Sweeps framework when editing copy
test_cases.input: Here's our landing page copy. Please review it: 'Our innovative platform leverages cutting-edge AI to facilitate seamless workflows and optimize operational efficiency for teams.'

test_cases.description: Verifies the skill identifies and removes weak filler words and corporate jargon
test_cases.input: Edit this: 'We basically just leverage our very robust platform to really facilitate seamless synergy between teams.'

test_cases.description: Verifies the skill applies the So What test to connect features to reader benefits
test_cases.input: Our platform uses AI-powered analytics and machine learning to process large datasets.
